channel.title: ICYMI Law — Blog-like Links
channel.description: Popular blog-like and newsletter-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: 101 Former Judges Ask the New York Bar to Investigate Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche
item.description:
Today, 101 former judges filed a complaint, asking the New York State Bar Attorney Grievance Commission to “initiate an investigation into Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche (Registration No.

item.title: This is what a 6-3 Supreme Court looks like
item.description:
On a rainy Tuesday in Washington, D.C., the reality of today's high court was abundantly clear as the court handed down four 6-3 decisions moving the law to the right.

item.title: Does DOJ even know how to issue subpoenas for a proper purpose these days?
item.description:
Judge Patrick Schiltz quashed federal grand jury subpoenas issued against Minnesota officials. The move echoes the quashed Federal Reserve and trans care subpoenas.

item.title: Judge Orders Release of Palestinian Community Leader Wrongfully Detained by ICE
item.description:
ICE detained Milwaukee community leader Salah Sarsour over his speech for over 80 days. The ACLU of Illinois just helped secure his release.

item.title: Trans prisoners' medical care remains protected after a flurry of court rulings on Wednesday
item.description:
A D.C. Circuit ruling would have allowed the Trump admin's anti-trans policy to go into effect, but a new district court injunction issued hours later blocked the policy yet again.
